chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2831 of 2025. Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) Priority. 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 07.08.2025. Ms. Kulsoom Khan Jadoon, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Petitioner. ************* 1. Complied with within two weeks. 2. Through this Petition, the Petitioner seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.203/2025, under Section 91(b) of Sindh Narcotics Substance Amendment Act, 2024, registered at P.S F.B. Indust. Area, Karachi. This petition was filed as earlier there was a bar under Section 35 of S.C.N.S Act of 2024. However, recently amendments were made and proviso in respect of bail has been inserted. Under the circumstances, we convert this Petition into protective bail and Petitioner is granted protective bail for a period of 15 days to appear before the trial Court/Special Tribunal/ or competent Court as the case may be on the same surety already furnished by the Petitioner before the Nazir of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on 21.08.2025 from today or when the Petitioner surrenders himself before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court, surety bond furnished, would be forfeited. The Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
